title: hibbertia tenuis
intro: Hibbertia tenuis, also known as the Slender Guinea-flower, is a small shrub native to eastern Australia. It has been used in traditional medicine for its antimicrobial and anti-inflammatory properties, which can help to soothe and protect the skin from infections and irritation. The health benefits of Hibbertia tenuis include its ability to support the immune system, reduce inflammation, and promote wound healing. In herbal preparations, the leaves and stems of Hibbertia tenuis can be used to make teas, tinctures, and salves, which can be applied topically or consumed orally to harness its medicinal properties.
